column1: Hey Ella, thanks for your interest in traveling with Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from Go Blue here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Our spring break is the week 14th
Cool I got you. how many ppl in your group?
yea thats solid! you all from the same school?
Yes all from university of Rhode Island
oh fire I went to Salve. small world lol
gonna put this info together for you rn, were you lookin to get things booked today?
Yeah sometime this week bc we were gonna go to Cancun w jus college and now all that stuff is going on
And can we include flights from jfk?
Loved “oh fire I went to Salve. small world lol”
oh I got you yea. flights are def cheaper to get separately on your own if youre lookin to save money
I'll send you some sample pricing and we'll go from there
is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
dope whats the best email to send to
just sent over a few sample quotes, lmk if you got it
And is that the package included?
We are ready to pay whenever also
We are ready to pay whenever also
okay cool will send over the reservation right now
We would wanna do the 5 night in occ Punta Cana
no prob emailed that over did you get it?
ah sorry lemme try again. mind also hitting your 'All Mail' tab sometimes things get filtered there
Loved “ah sorry lemme try again. mind also hitting your 'All Mail' tab sometimes things get filtered there”
And also r we able to pay tmrw or does it all have to be done by tonight
hey did y'all plan on securing that room?
Within the hour we are just doing the flights rn
All 4 of us just have to fill this out correct?
I never fully finished mine or paid but it's saying reserved
Are we able to just do it through the email link instead of that one u just sent
yea its a temp reserve in place while you finish getting things set up on your account
you each use the same reservation link to get set up
if you already made an account, log in here https://secure.gobluetours.com/site/public/sign-in
This is what it looks like
if you already made an account, log in here https://secure.gobluetours.com/site/public/sign-in
It's not letting our 3rd person make an account bc she can't click on the temporary reserved one
Ok wait we are good it just never had me put my passport info is that ok
and yea you can still add it in after, all good
okay cool. lmk when youre good and we'll get things processed
dope! lookin forward to havin y'all roll with us
If I also have another group of 4 would the be able to do it by Friday
Aight cool hmu Fri and we'll see if we can get them added in
We'll add them to your reservation
Do u need our flights for rides from airport to resort
yea just upload those into your accounts on the fights info tab
hey checkin in, did that group of 4 wanna get locked in?
No there all good actually but ty again
Hi I just had one more question is the party pass included in our trip?
hey right now you have the base package with the on-resort parties but I can get the off-resort party pass added in
comes with round trip coach bus transportation, express entry, cover charge, and open bar at Imagine Cave, Coco Bongo, Pearl Beach Club, and the booze cruise event
Coco Bongo: $79 per person Imagine: $89 per person Maroca: $69 per person Booze Cruise: $79 per person
I can do a bundle deal tho for 2 nights and the booze cruise for $200 as an add on
Loved “hey right now you have the base package with the on-resort parties but I can get the off-resort party pass added in”
Are we able to pay tmrw we would probably do the booze cruise and coco bongo
yea we can add it in tomorrow
Hi are we able to buy the whole pack today
Just the cruise and coco bongo, or all of the events?
oh we can do that yea, thatll only be 2 nightclubs and the booze cruise tho, rather than all 3 events + booze cruise
word all good now should be updated
What clubs do we get and how do we pay
its all right on your accounts you can log in here https://secure.gobluetours.com/site/public/sign-in
Coco Bongo, Imagine Cave, and the Booze cruise
Hi just one more question only one of us has to put in the flight info for the transportation right?
if youre all on the same flight I can duplicate it in
Wait I'm sorry another question what colleges go to this
hey my b I missed this. but tons of schools, FSU, UCF, Bama, Tampa, JMU, Rutgers and a lot more
there will be 1k+ other students here
Loved “there will be 1k+ other students here”
yoo Ella safe travels today! see y'all when you get here
wordd I'll see y'all through the day today. pool party at 2:30/3ish
Perfect we are gonna pregame rn at pool
